title: Jennie's Font
description: Read text easier and contain more on-screen with a thinner, serif font.
body:
Tired of the boring ol' Mojangles? Want something new, or just prefer something tidier? Look no further!

I plan on changing the rest of the font files, but those won't be finished in a while. accented.png is my main priority at the moment, and lords there's a lot of characters to change.
